title: TSFlareon's Item Core
description: Datapacks can't add items, so I have to do that separately.
body:
Datapacks can't add items, so I have to do that separately.

This is a very small mod that adds a few items that are needed in my datapacks. All included items are unattainable in survival mode unless you have the datapack they were made for.

If you somehow find a use for these oddly specific items, feel free to use this for your own datapacks.

Needed for Legends Untold v2.2+
